title: Sticking With It
notes: This album does a great job of blending classic soul with a modern twist. It sets the Dip as a pioneer in the Neo-soul genre, alongside Thee Sacred Souls and St Paul.
highlights: The great swing, harmonies, and simplicity throughout. Tracks like 'Anyways' and 'Eye of the Storm' are perennial favorites with their somber soul sounds.
lowlights: Lacks a bit of overall diversity, which prevents it from reaching a 9 or 10.
